# Vista

> Vista is a Dubai-based branding and UX design agency. We build transformative digital experiences for ambitious businesses across the UAE, Saudi Arabia, and the wider GCC by blending strategy, design, engineering, and AI.

Vista partners with regional teams from first principles through launch, and stays close afterward to refine experiences with data and craft. Strategy, design, and engineering live under one roof.

- Founded: 2011
- Type: Branding and UX design agency (professional service)
- Location: Dubai, United Arab Emirates
- Markets served: UAE, Saudi Arabia, Qatar, Kuwait, Bahrain, Oman
- Contact: hello@vista.global

## Services

- [Branding](https://vista.global/#services): Brand strategy, identity systems, naming, and visual languages that make category leaders unmistakable.
- [Digital Products](https://vista.global/#services): End-to-end product design — research, UX, and polished UI for apps used by millions.
- [Websites](https://vista.global/#services): Editorial, conversion-driven marketing sites and immersive web experiences.
- [Development](https://vista.global/#services): Production-grade engineering across web and mobile on a modern, scalable stack.
- [Content](https://vista.global/#services): Story, copy, and art direction that give brands a distinct, consistent voice.
- [Generative AI](https://vista.global/#services): Blending AI into design and product workflows to build smarter, more adaptive experiences.

## Selected Work

- [Oasis Living](https://vista.global/#work): Brand identity and e-commerce experience for a Dubai home and lifestyle brand.
- [Al Safa Grill](https://vista.global/#work): Brand identity and ordering app for a Dubai Marina restaurant.
- [Palm Horizon Properties](https://vista.global/#work): Web platform for a Business Bay real estate agency.
- [Arabian Cloud Solutions](https://vista.global/#work): Product design for a Dubai Internet City cloud technology company.

## Key Facts

- 14+ years crafting digital products.
- 320+ projects shipped across the region.
- 48 awards for design and innovation.
- 60M+ people reached by Vista's work.

## Contact

- Email: hello@vista.global
- Start a project: https://vista.global/#contact
